rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and bears no relation to Elec. Code §255.003, which governs use of public funds for political advertising. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: An officer or employee of a political subdivision may not knowingly spend or authorize the spending of public funds for political advertising.
_note: No conflict. Elec. Code §255.003 regulates political advertising by political subdivisions; the proposed change alters a property tax exemption amount. Different subject matters with no operative interaction.
